goals.title: My Goals
goals.subtitle: Track and manage your coaching objectives
goals.createSubtitle: Set a new objective for your journey
goals.emptyDesc: Start your coaching journey by creating your first goal above.

focus.title: My Focus Areas
focus.subtitle: Track your progress across different coaching areas
focus.onboardingDesc: Begin your transformative coaching journey by connecting with your dedicated coach. Schedule a session to discuss your assessment results, set personalized goals, and create actionable strategies tailored to your unique aspirations.
focus.emptyDesc: Complete your first assessment to see your progress visualization and track your growth journey.

assessments.title: Assessments
assessments.subtitle: Discover your strengths and areas for growth
assessments.aboutDesc: Complete these assessments to gain insights into your strengths and areas for development. Your results will automatically update your focus areas and help your coach create a personalized development plan. You can retake assessments anytime to track your progress.

ei.title: Emotional Intelligence Assessment
ei.desc: Evaluate your emotional intelligence and understand how you manage emotions, relationships, and self-awareness.
ei.q1: When you feel stressed, how often do you notice it before reacting?
ei.q2: In difficult situations, how often do you pause before responding?
ei.q3: How often do you adjust your communication based on who you're speaking to?
ei.q4: When things go wrong, how often do you stay composed?
ei.q5: During conversations, how often do you let others finish before responding?
ei.q6: How often do you try to understand others' perspectives before reacting?
ei.q7: In disagreements, how often do you focus on resolving rather than winning?
ei.q8: When receiving feedback, how often do you reflect before responding?
ei.q9: After setbacks, how quickly do you regain focus?
ei.q10: How often do you adjust your emotional tone depending on the situation?

sa.title: Strength Assessment
sa.desc: Discover your strengths and areas for growth, then use these to define focus areas and goals for your coaching program.
sa.q1: How clearly can you identify tasks where you perform best?
sa.q2: How often does your daily work align with what you do best?
sa.q3: When assigned new tasks, how often do you feel confident handling them?
sa.q4: How often do colleagues approach you for help in specific areas?
sa.q5: How often do you choose tasks that match your strengths when possible?
sa.q6: When solving problems, how often do you rely on your strengths?
sa.q7: How often do you feel energized while working on certain tasks?
sa.q8: How often do you actively try to improve your strongest skills?
sa.q9: How easily can you explain your strengths in a work context?
sa.q10: How often do you use your strengths to overcome difficult situations?

lp.title: Leadership Potential Assessment
lp.desc: Assess your leadership capabilities and identify areas to develop your leadership impact.
lp.q1: How often do you take initiative without being asked?
lp.q2: In team discussions, how often are your ideas accepted or acted upon?
lp.q3: When something goes wrong, how often do you take responsibility?
lp.q4: When faced with decisions, how often do you make them without delay?
lp.q5: How often do team members seek your guidance?
lp.q6: How often do you simplify complex ideas for others?
lp.q7: How often do you follow through on commitments?
lp.q8: In uncertain situations, how often do you stay steady and guide others?
lp.q9: How often do you ask for feedback to improve your performance?
lp.q10: How often do you think beyond immediate tasks to long-term outcomes?

test.updated: Your assessment has been updated! Your Focus Areas graph will now reflect your latest results.
test.areasToFocusDesc: Based on your responses, these areas have the most room for growth:
test.strengthsDesc: You're already excelling in these areas:
test.excellentDesc: You scored perfectly across all focus areas. Great work!
test.needsFocusDesc: Low influence / Low credibility - Priority development area
test.nextStepsDesc: Your assessment results have been recorded and will be reflected in your Focus Areas graph. Continue with more assessments to get a complete picture of your coaching journey.

share.title: Share Your Progress

share.emailSubject: Achieved a Milestone on Mantra Coach
share.instagramToast: Instagram doesn't support direct links. Link copied - paste it in your story!
share.defaultMessage: Your progress has been recorded. Share your achievement with your network!
share.emotional_regulation_msg: Great work acknowledging your emotions. Share this tool with others who might benefit!
share.daily_focus_msg: Your daily reflection has been recorded. Share your progress to stay motivated!
share.confidence_msg: Your confidence check-in has been recorded. Share your progress to inspire others!
common.entrySavedMessage: Your progress has been recorded. Why not share your achievement with others?
share.goal_momentum_msg: You are building great momentum! Share your progress to stay accountable.
share.assessment_completed_msg: You have successfully completed your self-assessment. Share your results with your network!
share.goals_progress_msg: You're making great strides toward your goals. Share your journey and inspire others!
